easyword

Hangman Game

Guess the hidden word before the hangman is complete. 6 wrong guesses and it's game over. Each word comes with a hint. Classic word puzzle fun.

Complete the game to see your score!

How to Play Hangman

1

A hidden word is shown as blank spaces. Read the hint below the word.

2

Click letters on the keyboard or type them to guess.

3

Correct letters appear in the word. Wrong letters build the hangman figure.

4

Guess the word before 6 wrong guesses. Click New Word to play again.

Tips to Improve Your Score

  • Start with the most common letters: E, A, R, I, O, T, N, S
  • Use the hint to narrow down the word category
  • Look for common letter patterns (TH, SH, ING, TION)
  • Once you have 2-3 letters, try to guess the whole word
  • Use the keyboard or type letters directly — both work

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you play Hangman?

A hidden word is shown as blank spaces. Click or type letters to guess. Correct letters fill in the blanks. Wrong letters add a body part to the hangman. You have 6 wrong guesses before the hangman is complete and the game ends.

What's a good Hangman strategy?

Start with common vowels (E, A, O, I) and consonants (R, S, T, N, L). These appear most frequently in English words. Use the hint to narrow down possible words. Once you have a few letters, try to guess the whole word.

Is Hangman educational?

Yes! Hangman builds vocabulary, spelling skills, and pattern recognition. It's used in classrooms worldwide as a fun way to practice language. The hint system helps develop word association and contextual thinking.

About the Hangman

The Hangman is one of our most popular brain training exercises. Designed to test and improve your cognitive abilities, this game provides instant feedback on your performance.

Regular practice with this type of cognitive exercise can help improve your mental processing speed, accuracy, and overall brain health. We recommend practicing for 10-15 minutes daily for the best results.

Your scores are saved locally on your device, allowing you to track your progress over time. Challenge yourself to beat your personal best with each attempt!
